findings.message: The plan standardizes unauthenticated upload responses to `401`, but existing xa-uploader catalog routes intentionally return `404` for unauthenticated access (`hasUploaderSession` guard pattern). This is a security-behavior inconsistency and should be explicitly justified or aligned.

The `Affects` list marks `apps/xa-uploader/src/lib/syncMutex.ts` as `[readonly]`, while acceptance requires extending `CloudflareEnv` with `XA_MEDIA_BUCKET` (line 126), which typically lives in that file today. This is contradictory and can cause implementation ambiguity.

Auto-generating placeholder alt text (`"{role} view"`) keeps schema counts aligned, but accessibility quality will depend on follow-up manual editing; consider calling that out explicitly in acceptance/UX notes.
